title: Trick XOR Treat
description: Adds two mutually exclusive enchants, trick and treat, to the game, just in time for the halloween season. Treat allows you to get candy from your enemies as you attack them, and Trick allows you to randomly play a handful of tricks upon your enemies.
body:
**Yet another entry from Spooky Jam 2021!** **Trick XOR Treat** adds two mutually exclusive sword enchants to the game, Trick and Treat. Trick has a chance to play strange sounds when hitting entities, or to debuff them, meanwhile treat leaves a chance for entities to drop magical candy at their feet when hit. # The shorthand explanation Both Trick and Treat reach a maximum enchantment level of 3 where there is a 15% chance for their given effect to apply for every hit (-5% per level below 3). Trick applies most vanilla debuffs, avoiding poison wither, and the warden's darkness effect. Treat randomly rolls from a pool of candy to drop. A few notes: * Candy restores very little hunger but can be eaten at any time and quickly * There is a small saturation buff for the candy * Each candy has potion effects attached to them, some good, some bad. You can see the details in your inventory, as you can with any potion.
